ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the city is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the city data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the food item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the food item (e.g., Grains, Pulses, Oils) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., kg, liter) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the food item */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the food item */,
  "seasonal" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the food item is seasonal */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the food item data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_items_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES food_item_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the data was collected */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the food item */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the price was collected */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the food item (e.g., NR for not reported) */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection center where the price was collected */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the price data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the price data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES food_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES data_centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection center */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the center is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the data collection center */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the data collection center */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data center data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_centers_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collectors" (
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collector */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the data collector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the data collector */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the data collector */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection center */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the data collector (e.g., junior, senior) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data collector data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collectors_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES data_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the price data entry */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collector */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was made */,
  "entry_time" TEXT /* Time when the log entry was made */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the log entry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_logs_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES price_data ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_logs_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES data_collectors ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food item category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the food item category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the food item category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the category data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data collector, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price trend entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend period */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend (e.g., percentage change) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trend */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the trend data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_trends_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES food_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_trends_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
